title: Prince William Ice Center ransomware incident

extortion.description: Prince William Ice Center provides Northern Virginia with a premier facility for all of your skating and hockey needs. We offer a full range of figure skating and ice hockey programs on our NHL and Olympic-sized rinks all year round. Our professional staff of ice hockey and figure skating instructors offer lessons for all ages and skill levels to assist our skaters and players to reach their optimum level of performance. Prince William Ice Center has a variety of public skating, Freestyle, and Stick & Shoot sessions scheduled through the week. Our full-service Pro Shop has professionally-trained skate sharpening technicians, and our Café offers snacks, meals, and catering for parties, business meetings, and team meetings.
